name: Ashveil Collective
specialty: Experts in infiltration and data retrieval, their uncanny ability to navigate the labyrinthine Undercity and decipher encrypted information sets them apart from other Serpent Choir operatives.

members.name: Vexis Vorenus
members.note: A veteran of the Iron War, his battle-scarred visage and stoic demeanor serve as constant reminders of the horrors he's witnessed.

members.name: Elysia Cinder
members.note: Her agility and keen senses are unmatched in the Undercity, but whispers suggest her loyalty may be divided.

visual: Clad in dark, form-fitting leather armor and donning Serpent Choir insignia, the Ashveil Collective moves through the city with silent precision. Vexis, the older of the two, carries a battered, silver-hilted sword, while Elysia, the younger, wears a hooded cape that conceals her features.
reputation_note: Rumored to have connections within the Argent Blades and the Tower Authority, their allegiances remain a mystery, and their presence in the Undercity is a warning to potential rivals.
